## Phase Gate Checklist

<!-- All boxes must be checked before merge. This IS the 7D enforcement. -->

### Definition ↔ Design

- [ ] Linked to a Definition issue with approved requirements
- [ ] Design issue exists with component design and interfaces
- [ ] All functional requirements (F01, F02...) are addressed

### Development

- [ ] Code follows the naming conventions in the Design
- [ ] Code follows the code standards in the Design
- [ ] No new dependencies added without documentation
- [ ] No secrets or .env values committed

### Diagnostics (Pre-Deploy)

- [ ] Tests written for each acceptance criterion
- [ ] All tests passing
- [ ] Lint passing with no warnings
- [ ] Build succeeds
- [ ] No new security warnings

### Documentation

- [ ] Component registered in Design issue or DESIGN.md (if new)
- [ ] API documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] README updated (if applicable)
